Headline: Brown Line Delays
ShortDescription: Loop- Bound Brown Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier loss of power at Rockwell. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop- Bound Brown Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier loss of power at Rockwell. 

Shuttle buses are available from Kimball to Belmont provide connecting service through the affected area until 11:45 am.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
